events.label: reasoning
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Missing box extension ring on deep finish wall",
    "Box is recessed beyond allowable depth, creating a fire and shock hazard"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an approved box extension ring to bring the box flush with the finished surface",
    "Verify that the extension ring is properly bonded and that the box fill is recalculated if necessary"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 314.20 requires boxes to be installed so that the front edge is flush with the finished surface or, if noncombustible, set back no more than 1/4 inch. A missing box extension on a deep finish leaves the box recessed, exposing combustible material and creating a gap that can allow arcing or fire spread. This is a non-compliant and hazardous condition.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 314.20 (Flush-Mounted Installations)",
    "NEC 314.16 (Box Fill) if extension changes volume",
    "NEC 300.14 (Length of Free Conductors) may be affected"
  ]
}
